name: Benchling Life Sciences R&D API
what_it_does: Benchling R&D cloud REST API for biotech and pharma research data management, electronic lab notebooks, and molecular biology workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage electronic lab notebook (ELN) entries and scientific data capture for research data automation, handle DNA/RNA sequence design and molecular biology tool integration for computational biology workflow, access assay and experiment data management for bioassay automation, retrieve registry management for biological material and reagent tracking, manage workflow and protocol automation for lab operations, handle inventory and sample management for biological material lifecycle, access genomic data and sequence analysis integration for bioinformatics workflow, retrieve regulatory submission data preparation for IND/BLA data package automation, manage project collaboration and team data access for research organization management, and integrate Benchling with LIMS, analytics platforms, and scientific instruments for unified R&D data workflow.
use_cases: Recording experiments from ELN automation agents
Designing sequences from computational biology agents
Tracking reagents from inventory management agents
Preparing regulatory data from submission agents
not_for: Clinical laboratory operations without research R&D focus
Manufacturing QMS without R&D data component
Non-life-sciences research without molecular biology data
best_when: A biotech, pharma, or synthetic biology company wanting AI agents to automate ELN data capture, molecular biology workflow, reagent inventory, assay data management, and regulatory submission data preparation.
avoid_when: 21 CFR PART 11 ELECTRONIC RECORDS: Automated ELN entries used in FDA-regulated research must comply with 21 CFR Part 11 electronic records and signature requirements; automated ELN without Part 11-compliant audit trail and electronic signature creates FDA data integrity violation. GLP DATA INTEGRITY: Automated research data management for Good Laboratory Practice (GLP) studies must maintain ALCOA+ data integrity principles (Attributable, Legible, Contemporaneous, Original, Accurate); automated data manipulation or backdating creates GLP inspection finding. Intellectual property data sensitivity — biotech R&D data in Benchling is highly sensitive IP; automated third-party data sharing or integration without IP protection controls creates trade secret misappropriation risk. Clinical trial data — automated Benchling data used in clinical trial submissions must comply with ICH E6 GCP and FDA data integrity guidance; automated clinical data with integrity gaps creates IND/BLA submission rejection.

auth.notes: Benchling uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2012. Private (Benchmark, Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ). Life sciences R&D platform. 200,000+ scientists. 600+ biotech and pharma customers. Unicorn ($6.1B+ valuation). Competes with Dotmatics (acquired LabArchives), IDBS, and Sapio Sciences for biotech R&D informatics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan for individual researchers; enterprise plans for organizations
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user annual enterprise subscription; research and regulatory modules
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Benchmark/Sequoia/a16z/ICONIQ-backed. Founded 2012. Unicorn $6.1B+. 200,000+ scientists. 600+ biopharma customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key and OAuth client; large sequence operations may be async

known_agent_gotchas: 21 CFR PART 11 COMPLIANCE FOR FDA SUBMISSIONS: Automated ELN entries used in FDA-regulated research must comply with 21 CFR Part 11; automated data capture must maintain complete audit trail with user attribution and timestamping; automated entries without Part 11 controls create FDA inspection data integrity finding

GLP DATA INTEGRITY ALCOA+: Automated GLP study data must be Attributable (user identified), Legible, Contemporaneous (recorded at time of activity), Original (first recorded), and Accurate; automated data backdating or non-contemporaneous entry creates GLP compliance violation

IP PROTECTION FOR R&D DATA: Benchling R&D data represents core biotech IP; automated integration with external platforms (AWS, cloud analytics) must implement IP protection controls; automated data exposure creates trade secret misappropriation risk

Entity schema versioning — Benchling uses a schema-first data model; automated integrations must handle schema version evolution as research teams evolve ELN schemas; rigid schema assumptions create integration failures on schema updates
Webhook event ordering — automated workflows dependent on ELN entry creation events must handle eventual consistency; entry events may arrive out of order for complex workflow triggers

Regulatory module separate from core — Benchling Regulatory module (for submission-ready data packages) may require separate licensing from core ELN; automated regulatory data preparation workflows require Regulatory module access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Life sciences R&D. SOC2, ISO27001, GxP. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Research data and IP.

security_score_components.security_notes: Life sciences R&D. SOC2, ISO27001, GxP. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Research and biotech IP data.
